hooks.command: echo 'REMINDER: Assets (StarterGui, Workspace, ReplicatedStorage.Assets, ServerStorage.Assets) live in-Studio and are discovered via Roblox MCP (search_game_tree / inspect_instance). Scripts stay on Argon. Consult filestructure/*.md before UI/VFX/sound/workspace work; refresh it after MCP reveals new instances. Protocol: .claude/reference/asset-discovery.md.'
echo 'REMINDER: If that MCP call revealed new or changed instances, refresh the matching filestructure/*.md and bump filestructure/last-updated.json.'
